Manufacturer: ZhenTec NT1 wireless multichannel EEG acquisition system

preprocessing_steps.Description: baseline removal (mean removal method), FIR filtering (0.5-40 Hz)

ManufacturersModelName: ZhenTec NT1 wireless multichannel EEG acquisition system
CapManufacturer: Xi'an ZhenTec Intelligence Technology Co., Ltd.
TaskDescription: Imagining grasping a spherical object with left or right hand while watching a video of gripping motion. Each trial: instruction stage (prompt), MI stage (4s video-guided imagery), break stage (rest). Trial duration: 8.0s, cue: 2.0s, imagery: 4.0s.
Instructions: Subject sat approximately 80 cm from computer screen. Computer played audio instructions. Patients imagined grasping spherical object with prompted hand during 4s video playback.
Description: EEG motor imagery dataset from 50 acute stroke patients performing left- and right-handed hand-grip imagination tasks. First open dataset addressing left- and right-handed motor imagery in acute stroke patients.
